title: Create one-to-one chat website with unique code-based connections

requirements.text: Create a user registration system that generates a unique numeric code for each user upon signup
acceptanceCriteria: Each user receives a unique numeric code upon registration
Code is displayed to the user after successful registration
Code can be used to identify and connect with the user

requirements.text: Implement a connection system where users can find and connect with other users by entering their unique code number

quotes: chating one to one with people with there unique code nunber

acceptanceCriteria: Users can enter another user's code to initiate a connection
System validates the entered code exists
Connection is established only between two specific users

requirements.text: Build a one-to-one chat interface where connected users can send and receive text messages in real-time

quotes: we can chat and do conversation with people one to one

acceptanceCriteria: Users can send text messages to their connected partner
Messages appear in a conversation thread format
Chat history is preserved and retrievable
Only the two connected users can see their conversation

requirements.text: Design a modern, user-friendly chat interface with a clean messaging aesthetic using warm, inviting colors like coral and teal, rounded message bubbles, and clear visual hierarchy for sender/receiver messages
acceptanceCriteria: Chat interface uses a cohesive color scheme with warm accent colors
Message bubbles are clearly distinguishable between sender and receiver
Interface is responsive and works on different screen sizes

requirements.text: Display the user's own unique code prominently in the interface so they can share it with others
acceptanceCriteria: User's unique code is visible in the main interface
Code can be easily copied for sharing

constraints: Use Internet Identity for user authentication instead of custom username/password system
Chat messages must be stored persistently in the backend
System must use polling for message updates since real-time WebSocket connections are not supported
nonGoals: File or image sharing in chat
User profile customization beyond the unique code
